entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A protein-rich legume consumed worldwide in various forms

entities.name: COTYLEDON
entities.description: The main seed fraction of pigeonpea, also known as dhal

entities.name: SEED COAT
entities.description: The outer hull of the pigeonpea seed, often treated as a byproduct

entities.name: NUTRIENT ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The process and amount of nutrients building up in seed fractions

entities.name: NUTRIENT LOSS
entities.description: The percentage of nutrients lost during the dehulling process

entities.name: NUTRIENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of estimating nutrient content in cotyledon and seed coat

entities.name: THREE-WAY ANALYSIS OF VARIANCE
entities.description: A statistical method used to determine the influence of cropping years, seed fractions, and genotypes

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: A nutrient enriched in the cotyledon of pigeonpea

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: A nutrient enriched in the cotyledon of pigeonpea

entities.name: POTASSIUM
entities.description: A nutrient enriched in the cotyledon of pigeonpea

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A nutrient found in both cotyledon and seed coat, but enriched in the former

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A nutrient found in both cotyledon and seed coat, but enriched in the former

entities.name: COPPER
entities.description: A nutrient found in both cotyledon and seed coat, but enriched in the former

entities.name: MANGANESE
entities.description: A nutrient equally enriched in both the cotyledon and seed coat

entities.name: CALCIUM
entities.description: A nutrient highly concentrated in the seed coat

entities.name: MAGNESIUM
entities.description: A nutrient concentrated in the seed coat

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: A physical characteristic of the seed correlated with nutrient improvement

entities.name: CORRELATION STUDY
entities.description: A study to determine the relationship between seed size and nutrient improvement

entities.name: TECHNOLOGICAL FRACTIONATION
entities.description: The process of separating seed components for use as food or pharmaceutical ingredients

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL FOOD INGREDIENT
entities.description: A food component that provides health benefits beyond basic nutrition

entities.name: DIETARY SUPPLEMENT
entities.description: A product used to add essential nutrients to the diet

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A deficiency in essential nutrients that can be addressed by dietary supplements

entities.name: ICRISAT PATANCHERU
entities.description: The research site in India where pigeonpea accessions were raised

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental condition during which the pigeonpea was grown

relationships.description: contains the cotyledon as a major seed fraction
contains the seed coat as a major seed fraction
revealed that small size is desirable for nutrient improvement
correlated with overall nutrient improvement in dhal
